reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Pertenezco al ACA y me hacen los descuentos correspondientes a la hora de cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I'm an ACA member and they give me the corresponding discounts when I fill up with fuel.

reviews.comment:
buena atencion hay dias que tienen demora porque se juntan muchos automovilistas por las pocas estaciones de servicio que hay

(Translated by Google)
Good service, although there are days with delays because many drivers gather due to the limited number of gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLLTkydm1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Son unos ladrones no compren ningún accesorio porque le cobran. El triple de lo que vale soy socio del ACA reclame ni cinco bolliya me dieron la excusa es una concesión no defienden al socio que estos delincuentes le roben.

(Translated by Google)
They're thieves, don't buy any accessories because they charge you three times what they're worth. I'm an ACA member and I complained, they didn't even give me five cents. The excuse was that it's a concession; they don't defend the members who are being robbed by these criminals.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLbmFQc2Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Protocolo covid como ninguna estación de servicio.  Buena atención  y buena calidad  de combustible  y productos.  El ACA es siempre recomendable en casi todo el país

(Translated by Google)
A COVID protocol like no other gas station. Excellent service and high-quality fuel and products. ACA is always recommended in almost the entire country.
